current_status: Front-end structure, styling, and core UI components established for both mobile and web applications.

next_feature_implementations.description: Replace in-memory data lists with SQLite (e.g., using the Drift package) for local data persistence. Integrate 'flutter_local_notifications' and 'workmanager' to trigger background alerts and send BLE 'speak now' frames to the rover when reminders are due.

next_feature_implementations.module: Mobile: Companion Screen / Web: ASL Modal
next_feature_implementations.description: Bridge the newly implemented live CameraPreview feed to the backend MediaPipe/Python services. Extract real-time sign language gloss and pipe the recognized gestures into the LLM conversational engine.
Implement live microphone audio capture for the Voice tab. Stream audio chunks to a Whisper STT backend (or on-device alternative) to transcribe speech to text before feeding it to the AI.
Replace the mock interval timers generating random battery/temperature data with a genuine WebSocket or BLE stream connected to the robot's hardware abstraction layer (HAL).

mobile_app_flutter.state_management: Centralized via Provider pattern (RoverProvider, AuthProvider) to prevent state drift.
mobile_app_flutter.ui_compaction: Highly compacted UI code via 'nc_primitives.dart'. All complex UI elements (NcAppBar, NcTile, NcBtnCard, NcSwitch) are abstracted into reusable atomic components. Screens are mostly declarative layouts using these primitives rather than raw Flutter widgets.

web_frontend_nextjs.routing_compaction: Role-based segregated paths (/rover, /guardian, /medical, /admin) sharing top-level layouts.
web_frontend_nextjs.ui_compaction: Standardized through TailwindCSS and reusable UI components (e.g., src/components/ui/Card, Button, Alert). This prevents CSS bloat and ensures visual consistency across the 30+ web pages.

codebase_compaction_and_architecture.overall_compaction_strategy: The entire NovaCare codebase achieves compaction by heavily favoring shared component libraries. By keeping business logic out of the UI layer and isolating it into Providers/Contexts, new screens can be built rapidly with just a few lines of declarative component code.
